note: Static, descriptive examples only. No image generation occurs in Moodle; a custom visual card requires a linked ChemIllusion account.

cards.title: Aspirin: spot the ester and carboxylic acid
cards.caption: A ChemIllusion visual study card highlights the ester (OR) next to the carboxylic acid (OH) so students stop confusing them.

cards.title: Acetaminophen: amide vs amine
cards.caption: Contrasts the amide nitrogen with the phenol OH on the same molecule.

cards.title: Caffeine: rings and carbonyls
cards.caption: Shows fused nitrogen-containing rings and the two carbonyls students often miss.
